mapper.sql: select question_id, course_id, chapter_id, knowledge_point_id, question_type, difficulty_level, stem, answer, analysis, source, quality_score, status from sc_question_bank
mapper.select: and course_id = #{courseId}and chapter_id = #{chapterId}and knowledge_point_id = #{knowledgePointId}and question_type = #{questionType}and status = #{status} order by question_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sc_question_bank(course_id, chapter_id, knowledge_point_id, question_type, difficulty_level, stem, answer, analysis, source, quality_score, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{knowledgePointId}, #{questionType}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{stem}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{source}, #{qualityScore}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_question_bank course_id = #{courseId},chapter_id = #{chapterId},knowledge_point_id = #{knowledgePointId},question_type = #{questionType},difficulty_level = #{difficultyLevel},stem = #{stem},answer = #{answer},analysis = #{analysis},source = #{source},quality_score = #{qualityScore},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_question_bank where question_id in #{questionId}
